title: Tunrothese
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Tunrothese''' was the native language of the [[Tunroth]] species from [[Jiroch-Reslia]].

Tunrothese was formed of grunts and snarls, using simple vocalizations, which gave it a primitive-looking aspect. Instead of an alphabet, Tunrothese used pictograms to represent only physical objects. Most Tunroths were fluent in both Tunrothese and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were only literate in their own language.

{{Language-stub}}
